title: Fried Ukrainian Dumplings
description: A crispy and savory take on traditional Ukrainian dumplings, served with a side of yogurt sauce.
instructions: Heat the fry to 350°F (180°C) in a deep frying pan.
Add the stir (soy sauce, if using) to the oil and stir briefly.
Carefully add the Ukrainian dumplings to the oil in batches and fry until golden and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fried dumplings on paper towels.
In a separate bowl, mix the yogurt with a pinch of salt to taste.
Serve the fried dumplings with the yogurt sauce on the side.
